response.original_title: Favorite Christmas Carols Set To Heart-Warming Scenes
response.overview: The joys of Christmas come alive with this enchanting musical videocassette. Snowy country landscapes.. The warm glow of Christmas candles...The jewel-like beauty of stained glass and tree ornaments... Yule logs. snowmen, a sleigh ride.. The bright, happy faces of children...And lots more...  And every magical Christmas moment is set to Christmas music! Enjoy superb choral singing of these carols:  •Silent Night •Away in a Manger •Hark, the Herald Angels Sing •God Rest You Merry Gentlemen •Joy to the World •O Tannenbaum •Deck the Halls •It Came Upon a Midnight Clear •We Wish You A Merry Christmas •O Little Town of Bethlehem •The Huron Carol •Up on the Housetop •Good King Wenceslas •Angels We Have Heard On High  Featuring the Choristers & Cathedral Singers of the Cathedral Church of Saint John the Divine
response.title: Favorite Christmas Carols Set To Heart-Warming Scenes
